# Batch Issue Creation: TG-BE-S0-037 through TG-BE-S0-060

15. **TG-BE-S0-051**: Architect Checkpoint: API skeleton design approval
16. **TG-BE-S0-052**: DevOps Checkpoint: Local serve, secrets and deployment readiness
